## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Bridget McGillivray (fwd.digital) and Ken Chan to discuss a potential recruiting role at GrowFX.](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowFX is a 6-month-old AI-first company closing Series A, planning to hire 20-25 engineers in 2025](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Ken has extensive experience building recruiting processes for tech startups expanding to Canada](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [The role involves significant ownership in building recruiting systems/processes from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Compensation discussion: Ken's current base is $160K USD with 15% bonus; GrowFX's range is up to $160K](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)

## Topics

### Company Background: GrowFX

  - [New AI-first company (6 months old) closing Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - ["Service as software" model, starting with AI-powered content marketing](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [CEO (Marcel) has impressive background as CMO at DeepGram, Scale, HashiCorp](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Currently operates like an agency, running AI workflows for clients with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
  - [Aiming to develop a scalable SaaS product for 10,000+ customers](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)

### Hiring Plans and Structure

  - [Planning to hire 20-25 engineers in 2025](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Global hiring capability, mix of traditional software engineers and AI/ML specialists](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
  - [Current engineering team: 3 people (CTO + 2 engineers)](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1422.0)
  - [Targeting hiring pace of \~2 engineers per month](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Flexible employment options: contractors (for those wanting USD) or full-time with benefits](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Recruiting Role and Responsibilities

  - [First founding tech recruiter position](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Significant opportunity for building and implementing processes](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Ownership of entire hiring experience, including systems and candidate journey](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [Implementing AI-driven recruiting tools (e.g., resume screening, video interviews)](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Building out infrastructure beyond basic Workable ATS and LinkedIn Recruiter Lite](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)

### Ken's Background and Experience

  - [12+ years in tech recruiting, including roles at Asana, Facebook, ProductBoard, and Apollo](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Specializes in building recruiting processes for companies expanding to Canada](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)
  - [Experience implementing tools like HackerRank, PorterByte, BrightHire, and optimizing ATSs](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Strong preference for roles involving significant building and ownership](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

### Compensation Discussion

  - [Ken's current compensation: $160K USD base, 15% annual bonus, plus equity](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)
  - [GrowFX's initial range: up to $160K USD (flexible, open to discussion)](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1912.0)
  - [Bonus structure not yet defined for this role](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bridget to coordinate a meeting between Ken and Daniel (CTO/co-founder)](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1957.0)
  - [Ken to send an official resume to Bridget](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)
  - [Further discussions on compensation structure and details to follow](https://fathom.video/share/F8Yk4aj53Ev8PEbYN9a8APC--6z-jqSv?tab=summary&timestamp=1974.0)
